working_on: Two workstreams: (1) durable independent cross-substrate verification of the S-0193 mempalace retire (audit doc capturing the plan-mode Layer 2 verification: 23/23 byte-equal samples across 7 rooms + diary delta +1 explained + 5 noise drawers documented + SHA-256 backup integrity); (2) close-time defenses to stop the recurring closure-failure pattern empirically observed across S-0184 → S-0193 — add closed_at + status as required fields in audit_archive_structured_fields.py, backfill 4 broken archives (S-0185, S-0187, S-0190, S-0191), author engine/tools/archive_session.py as deterministic step-13 mutation tool, rewire shutdown sequence + SKILL to use it.
declared_scope: Workstream 1: author engine/docs/audits/engine_memory_independent_verification_S-0194.md (the durable Layer 2 audit artifact). Workstream 2: (a) extend audit_archive_structured_fields.py REQUIRED_ARCHIVE_FIELDS with closed_at (str, since S-0001) + status (str with allowed_values [closed, closed_partial], since S-0001) + tests; (b) backfill engine/session/archive/S-0185.json (status), S-0187.json (closed_at), S-0190.json (status+closed_at), S-0191.json (closed_at); (c) author engine/tools/archive_session.py (~150 LOC) + engine/tools/test_archive_session.py with happy/closed_partial/idempotent/refusal cases; (d) rewrite step 13 in engine/operations/session-shutdown-sequence.md + .claude/skills/session-shutdown-sequence/SKILL.md to call the new tool; (e) file 2 follow-up Issues (scan_issue_collisions stopword tuning + psycopg.wait_c root cause). End-to-end verification: the S-0194 close itself uses archive_session.py, the extended audit runs against the resulting archive, the close commit refuses if either new required field is absent. phase: NA-engine
